title: Central Plugins Registry
description: Source-of-truth for all veiled-market plugins. finalize.py reads this file and generates both .github/plugin/marketplace.json (Copilot CLI) and .claude-plugin/marketplace.json (Claude Code) from it.

marketplace.description: Marketplace-level metadata written verbatim into the top-level fields of both generated marketplace.json files.

name.description: Marketplace identifier (kebab-case). Must be globally unique — reserved names like claude-code-marketplace are blocked.
Name of the maintainer or team.

url.description: URL of the maintainer or organization (extension used by Copilot CLI).

pluginRoot.description: Base directory prepended to relative plugin source paths in the generated marketplace files.

plugins.description: Canonical list of finalized plugins. Each entry is written into both generated marketplace.json files unchanged. Shape is identical to a marketplace.json plugin entry.
